tagline: Pick a category, then choose a game to play. Tip: click once inside the game window so the keyboard controls respond.

categories.name: Racing & Driving
categories.blurb: Steer, dodge and race to the finish.

categories.name: Endless Runners
categories.blurb: Run, jump and slide as long as you can.

categories.name: Action & Shooters
categories.blurb: Fly, aim and blast your way through.

categories.name: Fighting
categories.blurb: Punch, kick and brawl to win.

categories.name: Sports
categories.blurb: Play the game, score the runs.

corebound_pc.html.name: Corebound PC
corebound_pc.html.controls: WASD move · mouse to aim & shoot

karate_fighter.html.name: Karate Fighter
karate_fighter.html.controls: A / D move · ↑ kick · → punch · ← grab

street_brawl.html.name: Street Brawl
street_brawl.html.controls: Arrow keys move · Space to attack

math-hero.html.name: Math Hero
math-hero.html.controls: Type the answer · Enter to check

division-game.html.name: Math Adventure
division-game.html.controls: Type the answer · Enter to check

word-quest.html.name: Word Quest
word-quest.html.controls: Learn a new word a day

code-typer.html.name: Code Typer
code-typer.html.controls: Type the words · learn Python typing

_playDocs: Per-game touch config used by the injected play layer. type: game|keyboard|page. g = gesture map; each value is [key, code] dispatched as a synthetic keyboard event. l/r/u/d are swipe-and-hold directions, tap is a quick tap, dtap is a double-tap. start = key fired when the player taps Play (null = none). aim = also send a mouse click at the tapped point (for mouse-aim games).

road-racer.html.how: Swipe and hold left or right to steer your car. Tap anywhere to start, and tap again to pause or resume.

road-warrior.html.how: Swipe and hold a direction to drive — left, right, up to speed up, down to slow. Tap to start.

metro-rush.html.how: Swipe left or right to switch lanes, swipe up to jump, and swipe down to roll. Tap to start.

subway_runner.html.how: Swipe left or right to move, swipe up to jump, and swipe down to slide. Tap to start.

moon_rush.html.how: Swipe to move in any direction. Tap to start and to jump.

sky_fighter.html.how: Swipe to fly the jet in any direction. Tap to shoot. Double-tap to do a loop.

jet_defender.html.how: Swipe and hold left or right to move. Tap to fire and to start.

corebound_pc.html.how: Swipe and hold to move (up/down/left/right). On a phone your ship shoots the nearest enemy by itself — just move and dodge! On a laptop, use the mouse to aim and click to shoot.

karate_fighter.html.how: Swipe and hold left or right to move. Tap to punch, swipe up to kick, swipe down to grab.

street_brawl.html.how: Swipe and hold to move. Tap to attack.

cricket_game.html.how: Swipe left or right to aim your shot. Tap to bowl, then tap again to hit the ball.

math-hero.html.how: Read the question, tap the answer box to bring up your keyboard, type your answer, and press Enter to check.

division-game.html.how: Read the question, tap the answer box to bring up your keyboard, type your answer, and press Enter to check.

word-quest.html.how: Tap the buttons on screen to learn a new word each day. No keyboard needed.

code-typer.html.how: Tap the typing area to bring up your keyboard, then type the words shown to learn Python typing.

time-travel-explorer.html.how: Tap and scroll to explore. No keyboard needed — just tap the things you want to learn about.
